summary: PillCare Reminder full-stack testing complete. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests PASSED (catalogs, profile upsert with caregiver phone, medications CRUD with Claude auto-generic resolution, dose auto-generation + status update + stock decrement, composite BP measurement + simple glucose, activities, mood, 7-day adherence, brand->generic via Claude, caregiver alert returning delivered_via='mock' + log, CSV export with all sections, AI medication scanner returning required keys). Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): onboarding 3-step flow completes -> /(tabs)/today; Today tab shows greeting + week strip + FAB; Add Medication sheet creates 'Crocin' med, generic auto-resolved to 'paracetamol' visible on dose card; Taken action updates status to 'Taken' and reduces 'X of Y taken' counter correctly; Treatment sub-tabs switch (Medications/Measurements/Activities/Mood); Blood Pressure composite (118/76) saved and listed; Mood selector + Save works; Activity (steps 5000) saves; Progress tab shows streak/avg widgets; Support tab opens Scanner/Brand-Generic/Caregiver/Lifetime history/Privacy; Brand->Generic resolves Crocin to Paracetamol; Caregiver screen shows MOCKED OpenWA notice + recent mock alert log. No red screens, no console errors (only RN web deprecation warnings).

issues: Sub-tab chip row is horizontally scrollable - the 4th tab 'Mood' is partially off-screen at 390px width. Works but could be a flex wrap or smaller paddings for better discoverability.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. These come from react-native-web internals and Ionicons / shadow styles in components (e.g. today.tsx FAB shadow). Non-blocking but should be cleaned.

action_items: (Optional polish) Replace shadow* style props with boxShadow on RN Web targets to silence deprecation warnings.
(Optional UX) Make Treatment sub-tab chip row fully visible at 390px width (currently 'Mood' is off-screen until horizontal scroll).
No functional fixes required - all locked-in spec items pass.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 579 lines - approaching 700 limit, consider modularizing (routes per resource) for future maintainability.

create_medication catches generic resolution failure but EMERGENT_LLM_KEY presence check is good; logger is defined AFTER usage in _resolve_generic exception handler (logger declared at bottom of file). Works because module-level call ordering at request time, but cleaner to move logger init above routes.

update_dose_status: if mongo update for stock decrement runs even when dose doesn't exist (the find_one returned None branch skips it). Fine. But status 'taken' twice would decrement twice - consider idempotency check.
CSV export iterates all collections and joins meds by id - O(N) memory load; acceptable for personal-use scale.
seed_data_creation: Dropped pillcare_db collections before testing. Test run created profile (TEST_Alex), Crocin medication with auto-resolved generic 'paracetamol', dose entries, BP 120/80 + 118/76 measurements, blood_glucose 95, steps 3000+5000, mood entries, caregiver 'TEST_missed dose' mock log.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 backend endpoints validated end-to-end. Frontend Expo web preview validated for full onboarding -> today add med (Crocin -> paracetamol resolved by Claude) -> Taken status; Treatment BP composite, Mood, Activities; Progress widgets render; Support sub-screens work; Caregiver mock log visible. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is functional for Claude. OpenWA is mocked as expected.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs found. Build matches locked-in spec.
